_comment: Committed batch_of exemptions for audit_sense_dupes.py. Each subkey here is declared an intentional citation-budget split of ONE canonical sense, so the cross-part sense-duplicate guard treats the shared tag as legal rather than a defect. This file is the REPRODUCIBLE home for that declaration: the per-root rootmaps under src/pilot/input/ are gitignored and regenerated by _pilot_gen_merged.py, so a hand-edit there is silently lost on any clone or regen. See PROCESS_AUDIT_2026-06-29.md rec 15. siD is intentionally NOT whitelisted here pending source investigation.
